---
title: "EUR_DATA"
toc: false
---

## Open data on European politics

EUR_DATA provides structured, analysis-ready datasets, reproducible code, and
open educational resources on European political institutions. It is an
[Erasmus+ Jean Monnet Module](about.qmd) based at University College Dublin and
maintained by the
[Connected Politics Lab](https://github.com/Connected-Politics-Lab), integrating
the study of EU politics with hands-on data analytics.

### Available datasets

- **[Commission Formation (2024-2029)](data.qmd)** — the formation of the second
  von der Leyen Commission: the College, mission-letter commitments, confirmation
  hearings, the investiture vote, the 2025 Work Programme, and a formation
  timeline. Six interlinked tables, 1,588 rows in total.

More datasets will be added as the project develops.

### Explore

- **[Data](data.qmd)** — dataset documentation, downloads, and interactive
  visualisations.
- **[Teaching](oer.qmd)** — open syllabi, slides, and assessment materials.
- **[About](about.qmd)** — the project, its funding, and how to cite it.

### Licensing

Data and educational resources are released under
[CC-BY-4.0](https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by/4.0/); code under the
[Apache License 2.0](https://github.com/Connected-Politics-Lab/EUR_DATA/blob/main/LICENSE).
